source_cohort: Xu et al. 2023 — Chinese maintenance hemodialysis cohort

indian_recalibration.rationale: Recalibrates Chinese baseline event rate to Indian HD population prior

performance.source: Xu et al. 2023 — reported on held-out Chinese test set

retraining_triggers: Calibration slope drifts beyond ±0.15 from 1.0 on the weekly MLOps check
PR-AUC drops below 0.25 for two consecutive weekly reports
Brier score exceeds 0.25 for two consecutive weekly reports
Clinician-reported systematic mis-ranking of ≥3 patients in one quarter
Major cohort demographic shift (>20% change in mean age or albumin)
limitations: 7-year horizon: heavy right-censoring expected in most clinic cohorts
Predictions should be interpreted as relative ranking, not absolute probability
Trained on a Chinese cohort; Indian recalibration is empirical, not validated on a labelled Indian set
